/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/g++   -D_LANGUAGE_C_PLUS_PLUS  -fPIC -O0 -g -D_DEBUG  -DTARG_MIPS CMakeFiles/isa_operands_gen-mips.dir/generate/isa_operands_gen.cxx.o CMakeFiles/isa_operands_gen-mips.dir/isa/mips/isa_operands.cxx.o  -o ../../../lib/mips/isa_operands_gen -rdynamic ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_properties.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_registers.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_enums.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_lits.a ../../../lib/mips/libisa_gen_topcode.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_subset.a ../../../lib/mips/libgen_util.a
